name: Walking Up
description: Sing up a scale — Do Re Mi Re Do. Focus on clean steps, not slides between notes.

feedback.intro: I'll play a 5-note pattern: up two steps and back down. Match each note with a clean jump — try not to slide.
feedback.waiting: Listen to the pattern, then sing each note...
feedback.tip: Clean transitions train your vocal muscles to jump precisely. Sliding is easier but builds bad habits.
